FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- doc/
- examples/
- m4/
- macosx/
- symbian/
- tests/
- win32/
- aclocal.m4
- autogen.sh
- compile
- config.guess
- config.h.in
- config.sub
- configure
- configure.ac
- depcomp
- install-sh
- lib/Makefile.am
- lib/Makefile.in
- libtheora.spec
- libtheora.spec.in
- ltmain.sh
- Makefile.am
- Makefile.in
- missing
- mkinstalldirs
- SConstruct
- theora.pc.in
- theora-uninstalled.pc.in
- theoradec.pc.in
- theoradec-uninstalled.pc.in
- theoraenc.pc.in
- theoraenc-uninstalled.pc.in
